title: sinapis pubescens subsp. indurata
intro: Sinapis pubescens subsp. indurata, also known as the prickly mustard, is a subspecies of the sinapis pubescens plant, which is a type of wild mustard. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of sinapis pubescens subsp. indurata include its potential to help treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of allergies. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
